---
title: "About This Site"
toc: false
---

## Purpose

This site lists a number of behavioural biases in financial decision-making, as those are documented in the paper ["The effect of behavioral biases on financial decisions"](https://doi.org/10.22490/25392786.4963), by David Peon and Manel Antelo.

The aim is to offer a reference tool for students, practitioners, and anyone curious about the psychology behind economic choices. Each bias presents its definition, one or more examples associated with it, as well as cross-links to related biases.

## Contact

Do you have a suggestion for improving the page or a project idea? You can drop me an <a href="mailto:&#97;&#107;&#112;&#114;&#111;&#100;&#114;&#111;&#109;&#111;&#117;&#64;&#103;&#109;&#97;&#105;&#108;&#46;&#99;&#111;&#109;">email</a>.
